
```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.height = 10}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(targets)

# coverage
df <- df
coverage <- data.frame(
  column = names(df),
  percent = colSums(
    df != "" &
    df != " " &
    df != "NA" &
    !is.na(df)
  ) / nrow(df),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# summary
summary_vals <- summary(coverage$percent)

# barplot
coverage %>%
  arrange(percent) %>%
  mutate(column = factor(column, levels = column)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = percent, y = column)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(x = "Coverage", y = "Trait", title = "Data coverage of each trait") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

```
